headline: Is It Too Late To Consider IDEXX Laboratories (IDXX) After A 43% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether IDEXX Laboratories at around US$589 per share is still a sensible entry or if you are late to the story, this breakdown will focus squarely on what you are paying for today. The stock has returned 4.7% over the past week and 2.1% over the last month, while year to date it is down 12.1% but up 43.2% over the past year. Recent coverage has highlighted IDEXX Laboratories as a key player in veterinary diagnostics and animal health solutions, which helps explain why...
